reviews.review_description: The game is way too laggy to be playable dev banned 3 random people for asking for bug fixes someone's headset got destroyed playing this game and instead of the dev helping he banned the guy and the game models suck they also accused APEOUT of stealing there game mechanics DO NOT PLAY THIS GAME. Also everyone rating 5 stars is part of the discord server and was told to I had high hopes for this game if only it had a better dev.ALSO the game is complete slop the game mechanics are terrible along with the movement and every single time someone ask for a bug fix he bans them saying "stop spreading misinformation" I have photo proof of this... 1 star.
